productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Casual Purple Sandals
description: The perfect way to complement your casual and ethnic wear is to slip into these comfy slippers from carlton london. The cushioned footbed and adjustable midfoot strap ensures maximum comfort, while the PU outsole lends traction to every step you take.UpperLeather straps witha  toe separator to lock the foot in placeBuckle-adjustable midfoot strap to offer a customised FitToe post with a raised toe bar for enhnaced gripCushioned footbed with ergonomically raised nubs for all-day comfort OutsoleLightweight durable PU outsole with dash grooves on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and tractionCurved midfoot for inner-arch supportSlipper careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
